company.name: ScalePilot
company.product_description: ScalePilot is an AI-assisted revenue intelligence and outbound orchestration platform for startup sales teams.
company.value_proposition: Help GTM teams prioritize the right accounts and launch high-conversion, multi-channel ABM plays in days instead of weeks.
differentiators: India-first data enrichment for startup ecosystems
Built-in buying committee detection for lean sales teams
Playbook automation with rapid experimentation loops
company.pricing_model: Annual subscription with seat + usage tiers

buying_triggers: Recent funding round in last 12 months
VP Sales or Head of Growth hired in last 6 months
Inbound lead growth without corresponding SDR scale-up
negative_icp: Services-heavy agencies with no repeatable SaaS product
Pre-revenue startups with fewer than 20 employees
Regulated enterprises requiring on-prem deployment only

pain_points: Low outbound conversion despite high SDR activity
Poor visibility into multi-threaded deal progression

competitors.name: Apollo.io
weaknesses: Generic outreach flows for India-focused segments
Limited contextual account narratives for startup GTM motions

competitors.name: ZoomInfo
weaknesses: Higher total cost for mid-market startups
Complex setup for lean revops teams

competitors.name: Clay
weaknesses: Steeper learning curve for non-technical SDR managers

win_themes: Noticeable lift in meetings booked from focused ICP lists
Strong founder confidence due to transparent account scoring
loss_themes: Deals lost when buyers prefer all-in-one CRM suites
Losses in accounts needing deep custom BI integrations

existing_account_list.notes: Recently raised Series A; hiring SDRs aggressively.
Expansion upsell opportunity likely in Q3.
